race.comment: MIDNIGHT MOOSE (3) jumped favourite on resumption at Moruya but didn't have the best of luck when finishing well back. That was in much stronger company though and he now comes right back to a Class 2. Better placed here on firmer footing and he can get himself back on track. SHE CONQUERS (2) comes through the same race as MIDNIGHT MOOSE where she was a $6 chance. She usually improves with racing and while she hasn't won for a while, she's been sparingly raced in the past 12 months. Return effort is a nice platform for her to build on. DIAMOND FROST (7) finished off strongly on resumption to win over 1206m in an effort that rated a tick below his best. He's a track and trip winner previously and is also a winner second-up. Cahill's claim comes in handy and he can repeat the dose. OLIVIA MIA (8) bolted in at this track and trip last time out and has to be included with this shaping similarly. TESSY TEE (4) won't be far away if she runs to recent form.
